Mock Record Status Dashboard data

Source: R/data.R
mock_record_status_data.Rd

A synthetic dashboard tile table generated from mock_redcap_project with REDCapExploreR's internal record-status logic. This dataset is suitable for examples of plot_record_status().

Usage

mock_record_status_data

Format

A tibble with one row per record, event, and form tile.

Source

Generated by data-raw/mock-data.R.
